_comment: cockpit_image: path to the full cockpit background image, relative to the project root.
Set this to 'panel pics/YOUR_FILENAME.jpg' when you add a new main image.
If null, the app auto-detects: it looks for the largest image in 'panel pics/'
that is NOT listed as a panel key in panel_categories.json.
panels_dir: folder containing all panel cutout images (relative to project root).
bios_file:  DCS-BIOS JSON definition file (relative to project root).
cockpit_image: panel pics/NeoEngress FA-18C Full Layout - 4220x5200 white.jpg
